seoTitle: How to Sell Ebooks on Gumroad: Full Setup Guide
metaDescription: Learn how to list, price, and publish an ebook on Gumroad, including uploading your PDF or ePub file and writing a sales page that converts.
intro: Selling an ebook on Gumroad means combining a good sales page with a straightforward upload process, and this guide walks through both. From choosing the ebook product type to uploading your final file and publishing, you'll see the steps needed to get your book in front of readers.

steps.heading: Choose the ebook product type
steps.body: Select the ebook or digital asset option when creating a new product so Gumroad configures the listing correctly.

steps.heading: Write your sales page copy
steps.body: Craft a headline and description with bulleted benefits that explain what readers will get from your book.

steps.heading: Upload cover graphics
steps.body: Add a cover image and preview graphics that make your ebook look appealing on the storefront.

steps.heading: Attach your ebook file
steps.body: Upload the finished PDF or ePub file that readers will receive after purchase.

steps.heading: Set pricing and publish
steps.body: Choose a price or enable pay-what-you-want, then publish and share your link with readers.

faq.question: What file formats can I sell as an ebook on Gumroad?
faq.answer: PDF and ePub are common formats sellers use for ebooks on Gumroad.

faq.question: Can I protect my ebook from unauthorized sharing?
faq.answer: Some sellers use file-level protections when uploading, though the exact options depend on Gumroad's current settings.

faq.question: Should I offer pay-what-you-want pricing for my ebook?
faq.answer: It can work well for building an audience, but a fixed price is often better once you have proven demand.

faq.question: Can I update my ebook after it's published?
faq.answer: Yes, you can re-upload a revised file, and buyers typically retain access to the latest version.
